programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits tourist hotspots in the USA in search of river monsters.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade journeys up the Congo River in search of the ferocious Goliath Tiger Fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Snakehead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates whether the snakehead deserves its fearsome reputation.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to the jungles of South America to track down a dangerous fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in the Australian outback trying to catch the rare freshwater sawfish.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to Colombia to investigate a creature blamed for killing a new bride.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to south east Asia's Mekong river in search of a baby-faced killer.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to Thailand in search of the 700lb giant freshwater stingray.

programme.title: River Monsters - Deep Sea Demon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes in search of the truth behind the sea serpent legend.

programme.desc: Two men mysteriously vanish on a remote lake in Malaysia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the Zambezi River in Africa.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic Pacific island, an ancient fishing community is being terrorised.

programme.title: River Monsters - Asian Slayer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Himalayas to investigate river attacks.

programme.title: River Monsters - Congo Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo River on the trail of the legend of the spirit Mami Wata.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Japan on the trail of the kappa, a fish about which legends abound.

programme.desc: Jeremy is convinced a river monster is at large after hearing tales of a body-snatching.

programme.title: River Monsters - Ice Cold Killer
programme.desc: Travelling from London to Greenland and on to Norway.

programme.title: River Monsters - Rift Valley Killer
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade is on a quest to Africa's Great Rift Valley.

programme.title: River Monsters - Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade braves the radiation in Chernobyl on the trail of a monster fish.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Athletic Feat - EP22
programme.desc: Who has realised the greatest athletic exploit of all time?

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep13 - EP113
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Saving Klaus - EP108
programme.desc: Klaus is on loan to a local car museum, but the Shaq Paq gets the wrong idea and suits up for a clandestine rescue operation.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep6 - EP106
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep7 - EP7
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Music Values - EP125
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that music helps us express our ideas and even our emotions. The rhythm, the melody, and harmony are the most important elements. Music can help us develop special skills such as: be persistent, be focused, it teaches us to communicate, share, and cooperate with other people. Music has the magic of uniting people because almost everyone shares a love for music!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Manners when we travel - EP126
programme.desc: In this episode, Nova will take the viewers on a field trip through the different methods of travel. You should never leave your parents or the people you are travelling with! We will review some Planet Tools that will help us to make a calm trip inside the wagons of the train. The most important thing is not to reach the destination, but to enjoy the trip!

programme.title: Mellodees - The Grand Old Duke Of York - EP27
programme.desc: What a great day! It’s time for an outdoor stretch. Can you sing ‘The Grand Duke of York’? Then join the march with Dee on the streets!

programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight a group trying to evade environmental laws.

programme.desc: Queenie is too big to go through the fancy carwash she saw on TV. The Shaq Paw has to find a way to cheer her up.

programme.desc: In this first episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will invite the children to accompany her on their first adventure together. The tour will take them to know and discover how they should behave at the table, learning that cutlery is a very important tool and that they have their own language.

programme.title: Mellodees - ABC's Song - EP1
programme.desc: Learn the alphabet while you dance and sing-a-long with Dee!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep20 - EP120
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Green Gig - EP213
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team record a song to promote saving the environment.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - To Catch a Truck - EP111
programme.desc: Shaq's special painting is stolen, It's up to the Shaq Paq to find the thief and recover the work of art.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Fungal Bungle / Water Friends For? - EP114
programme.desc: Kent’s extreme attempts to cure his toe fungus in time for a pool party cause the fungus to mutate and grow into a fungus-based replica of Kent himself. The Secret Lab Kids have to stop the replicant before it turns the whole lab into a stinky, sticky fungus-farm. / When Kent manages to contact aliens, they land at the Edison complex and demand that the Secret Lab kids help them find a very valuable "treasure" that their planet needs. The trouble is, they don't know the earth word for this treasure - sending our kids scrambling to solve this mystery before they get turned into "shrablitz”!

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep14 - EP114
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Alien Mayhem! | Episode 1, 2, 3
programme.desc: God’s Gang faces insane challenges - from stopping a mad scientist to battling aliens and saving blue whales.

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | The Cotton Candy Conspiracy | Episode 1
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Blue Whales and Reptilian Ruses | Episode 2
programme.desc: God's Gang embarks on an underwater mission to rescue blue whales, only to encounter an alien ambush. The team faces unexpected challenges while trying to infiltrate a clandestine blue whale party. Suspense builds as they attempt a daring rescue operation.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Chuck the Cherry Picker helps Harvey
programme.desc: Harvey needs a helping hand harvesting fruits from the tall trees! Troy selects the best truck to help: Chuck the Cherry Picker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Frank the Fire Trucks saves Gary
programme.desc: Uh-oh, Gary the Garbage truck is on fire! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Frank the Firetruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Amber the Ambulance helps Ethan
programme.desc: Ethan the Dumptruck feels sick; he ate too much candy! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Amber the Ambulance!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Ethan The Dumptruck collects the bouncy balls
programme.desc: Pickle dumped a tonne of bouncy balls on the motorway! Troy selects the best truck to help her: Ethan the Dumptruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Dane's Wrecking Ball causes mayhem
programme.desc: Dane's wrecking ball accidentally fell off and knocked Frank! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Hector the Helicopter!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Christopher getsstuck in cement
programme.desc: Christopher fell asleep and woke up covered in concrete! Troy selects the best truck to help release him: Dane the Crane!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BUILDING BLOCKS, FALLING TOWERS – ROOKIE AND THE MOLE
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large box full of building blocks. He starts building towers, but they keep collapsing whenever he looks away. He discovers a hole in the ground with nothing inside, but curious as ever, he presses a button to inflate himself and blows into one of the holes, causing the troublemaker, a friendly mole, to pop out. Rookie catches his new friend , and together they set up an amazing building.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - HAPPY BIRTHDAY TOOO YOUUUUU! ROOKIE AND THE BIRTHDAY BASH
programme.desc: In the final episode of the second season, Rookie hears suspicious noises and begins to investigate. But he can‘t find the source! When he finally opens a door, he is greeted by a confetti cannon - a surprise birthday party! All his friends are gathered around a cake with two candles, and at the little turtle’s count, they all join in singing ‘Happy Birthday’ together!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Show do Jacarelvis
programme.desc: O Jacarelvis tenta fazer um show quando uma abelhinha aparece em seu caminho, esse imprevisto pode se tornar uma grande parceria!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Papa Tudo
programme.desc: Ao som de um gostoso rock vamos todos comer direitinho, o Jacarelvis e amigos mostram como é bom e gostoso comer de tudo um pouco e como e importante os legumes e frutas nas refeições.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Escovo os dentes
programme.desc: Um divertido reggae feito para ajudar as crianças durante a escovação dos dentes, tornando esse momento divertido e prazeroso.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Minha Escola
programme.desc: Uma homenagem bem didática ao segundo lar de muitas crianças!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Da Aqui
programme.desc: Aprenda sobre as frutas e alguns de seus benefícios ao ritmo de um Rock'n Roll!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Castigo
programme.desc: Vamos tentar entender esse tal de castigo ao som de um divertido blues !

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Mico Tuco
programme.desc: O Mico Tuco te cutuca nesse rockabilly que não vai deixar ninguém parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Tem que limpar
programme.desc: Tudo que suja, molha ou quebra precisa de alguém pra ajeitar, não é mesmo? O Jacarelvis e seus amigos mostram como ajudar a mamãe e o papai de uma forma divertida e segura.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacare Careca
programme.desc: Uma divertida cantiga que brinca com a sonoridade do nome dos animais.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Underwater
programme.desc: Accidentally, Chip and his friends fall into a lake where they are collected by the spacecraft of a sodium atom that carries them to Sodia, an underwater city. There, the atoms of sodium and chlorine live a long conflict. The chlorine wants to join to sodium to form molecules of sodium chloride while sodium atoms prefer to remain. The patrol antimatter comes into contact with chlorine and propose them to provide rifles to dominate the sodium and so force them to molecularized, but Chip makes a fool of the antimatter and makes the chlorine and sodium are no longer enemies and prevails the peace in the underwater world.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - The storm
programme.desc: Inside an old wind mill in the midst of a severe storm, Chip and his friends expect it to pass and continue their way. Outside, under the stormy air, the patrol antimatter communicate to Dr. No that they have already found the boy. The evil scientist is confident that this time they will not fail. But when the wind stops, Chip devises a strategy and let the antimatter locked in the mill, as he and the atoms move on.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Beach Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Sign
programme.desc: The ice cream sign's disappeared! This can only be Zitron's handy work. Rodeo, Booster and Dane merge to stop the thief.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Super Fire Truck
programme.desc: Frank is teaching Robo and Booster the basics of a firetruck when Zitron starts a fire using fireworks. Time to merge!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Pumpkin Pie Stand
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Zitron spooks Carrie and throws pies at everyone at the farm. It's time to stop the mischief.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Halloween Tricks
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster’s friends dress up for Halloween, but Zitron gets in the way of the fun. Robo to the rescue.

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.desc: Baby Frank's been playing at the paint shooting range as in covered in it! Tom gets him all shiny again.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: Baby Hector's spent the afternoon jumping in puddles; the mud got his blades stuck! Time for a trip to the carwash.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Beehive
programme.desc: Jeremy's crashed into a beehive and is covered in honey! Tom helps him get rid of the sticky stuff.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Rusty Chuck
programme.desc: Chuck’s Cherry picker arm is rusty and stiff. He goes to Tom’s Car Wash to get cleaned up and oiled up!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Playdate
programme.desc: Baby Amber got all dirty while playing with Baby Matt. Tom giver her an emergency carwash and a polish.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures...

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: King of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Norwegian winter, early 20th century. On the boys’ home Bastoy, a new inmate leads the boys to a violent uprising against a brutal regime. How far is he willing to go to attain freedom? Based on a true story.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.

programme.title: Bluebird
programme.desc: In small town Maine, a school bus driver becomes distracted during her end-of-day inspection and fails to notice a sleeping boy in the back of the bus. What happens next shatters the tranquillity of her small logging town.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: Hotel Barcelona (2)
programme.desc: After returning to her parents’ hotel in Barcelona, Laura spends a romantic night with deputy manager Mateo. Though drawn to him, she must stay professional - especially as her troubled son Pedro drifts further away and family conflicts resurface.

programme.title: Lost In Marseille
programme.desc: Bruno, a stay-at-home father of two, gets back in touch with his masculinity when his wife is kidnapped in Marseille. Instead of the planned holiday on the Côte d'Azur, Bruno gets deeper and deeper into an intrigue, pursued by police and mafia.

programme.title: King of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Norwegian winter, early 20th century. On the boys’ home Bastoy, a new inmate leads the boys to a violent uprising against a brutal regime. How far is he willing to go to attain freedom? Based on a true story.

programme.title: Heart Of A Lion
programme.desc: Teppo, the leader of a gang of neo-nazis, falls in love with Sari. To his shock, Sari’s son is black, and Teppo finds his prejudices and loyalties pitted against his desire for love and family.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Hush Little Baby
programme.desc: After a lantern parade, two-year-old Paulina is found missing from her room. The chilling kidnapping hurls Investigator Martin Bruhl back into a sleepless nightmare he experienced two years ago.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Jealousy
programme.desc: Inspector Bruhl is investigating the abduction of a young boy from a playground, until evidence suggests that the boy doesn’t exist at all. Is he a figment of the alleged mother’s fractured reality, or are answers buried in her traumatic past?

programme.title: So Far, So Close
programme.desc: Junho is a lively, sociable bar owner who enjoys being surrounded by people, yet deep inside carries a delicate yearning for the lover he lost ten years ago. Whenever he encounters someone who resembles her, he can’t help but stare, captivated by memory.

programme.title: Red, White And Brass
programme.desc: In a bid to sneak into the Tonga vs France rugby match, superfan Maka invents a fake band to perform for the pre-game show. With the match coming soon, Maka and his friends have four weeks to come up with a performance

programme.title: The Kiss
programme.desc: In 1913 Denmark, young officer Anton grapples with duty and love when he befriends Baron von Løvenskjold's daughter, Edith, confined to a wheelchair. As their bond deepens, Anton is ensnared in a web of promises and lies, torn between pity and true love.

programme.title: Above the Clouds
programme.desc: After losing his parents in a flood, 15-year-old Andy is forced to live in the Mountain Province with his estranged grandfather. Feeling they’ve lost everything, the two embark on a journey and start to come to terms with their grief.

programme.title: A Son
programme.desc: A family’s holiday in Tunisia ends in disaster, when their 10-year-old son Aziz is shot during a terrorist ambush. At the hospital where Aziz is in desperate need of a transplant, the family discovers a long-buried secret.

programme.title: Star Awards 2026 - Backstage Live: Unfiltered: With the Stars 红星大奖2026– 幕后直击: 风华渐起
programme.desc: Star Awards 2026 – Backstage LIVE brings viewers into the heart of the action with an exciting 6.5-hour marathon filled with energy, surprises, and unforgettable moments. Helmed by YES 933’s popular trio — Jeff, Chen Ning, and Mei Gui from the top-rated “The DAKA Show” — alongside DJs Chen Qijia and Lim Pin Juen, the programme offers non-stop access to everything happening beyond the main stage. From the fan-favourite “MY PICK! Awards” and expert fashion commentary to exclusive interviews and real-time reactions, Backstage LIVE reveals the stories, emotions, and unfiltered moments behind it all. 6个半小时，精彩不停歇。YES 933超人气“大咖”组合Jeff、陈宁、高美贵火力全开，联手陈启佳、林品隽，带你直击后台第一线，解锁明星私下最真实、最好玩的那一面。 从粉丝最期待的“MY PICK!”场外奖项，到时尚编辑现场点评；从第一手专访，到实时红星动态更新——那些你平时看不到的故事与小秘密，都在这里一一揭开。

Awards” and expert fashion commentary to exclusive interviews and real-time reactions, Backstage LIVE reveals the stories, emotions, and unfiltered moments behind it all. 6个半小时，精彩不停歇。YES 933超人气“大咖”组合Jeff、陈宁、高美贵火力全开，联手陈启佳、林品隽，带你直击后台第一线，解锁明星私下最真实、最好玩的那一面。 从粉丝最期待的“MY PICK!”场外奖项，到时尚编辑现场点评；从第一手专访，到实时红星动态更新——那些你平时看不到的故事与小秘密，都在这里一一揭开。

programme.title: The Hellbenders
programme.desc: After the civil war, a hell-bent Confederate Army Officer and his sons rob a Union Caravan carrying a fortune, killing every man and beast in the process. Now they must con and fight their way across the west through thousands of cavalry, lawmen, bounty hunters, and Indians to make their escape.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Manners when we travel - EP126
programme.desc: In this episode, Nova will take the viewers on a field trip through the different methods of travel. You should never leave your parents or the people you are travelling with! We will review some Planet Tools that will help us to make a calm trip inside the wagons of the train. The most important thing is not to reach the destination, but to enjoy the trip!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - How to behave at the table? - EP101
programme.desc: In this first episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will invite the children to accompany her on their first adventure together. The tour will take them to know and discover how they should behave at the table, learning that cutlery is a very important tool and that they have their own language.

programme.title: Mellodees - ABC's Song - EP1
programme.desc: Learn the alphabet while you dance and sing-a-long with Dee!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep20 - EP120
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Green Gig - EP213
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team record a song to promote saving the environment.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - To Catch a Truck - EP111
programme.desc: Shaq's special painting is stolen, It's up to the Shaq Paq to find the thief and recover the work of art.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Fungal Bungle / Water Friends For? - EP114
programme.desc: Kent’s extreme attempts to cure his toe fungus in time for a pool party cause the fungus to mutate and grow into a fungus-based replica of Kent himself. The Secret Lab Kids have to stop the replicant before it turns the whole lab into a stinky, sticky fungus-farm. / When Kent manages to contact aliens, they land at the Edison complex and demand that the Secret Lab kids help them find a very valuable "treasure" that their planet needs. The trouble is, they don't know the earth word for this treasure - sending our kids scrambling to solve this mystery before they get turned into "shrablitz”!

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep14 - EP114
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.desc: Gronk runs into the Abominable Snowman.

But if he lets someone else dance for him, is he really a winner? / When the kids are responsible for a female gorilla breaking out of the zoo, they need to figure out how to do some heavy lifting to return her.

programme.title: Mellodees - Baa Baa Black Sheep - EP9
programme.desc: Join our dance party at The Farm. Dee shows the sheep how to get down.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep15 - EP115

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Love is in the Airhole | Episode 3
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | What's Cooking | Episode 4
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Mystery Ally in the Flames | Episode 5
programme.desc: A forest trip turns into chaos when wildfire strikes! With no tech, the gang must unite to survive. Just when hope fades, a glowing hero appears. Who is it?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Trials of KungFuda | Episode 6
programme.desc: A forest in flames. A rising fear. Enter Kungfuda, the mystery kicker who pushes God’s Gang to unlock their true power. Can the gang overcome fear and awaken as true Forest Guardians before darkness consumes it all?

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Digger Train
programme.desc: Billy the Bulldozer's trapped in the tunnel! Teddy turns Troy into a digger to rescue his poor friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Demolition Train
programme.desc: Little Tina is trapped under a building! Teddy and Troy waste no time and devise a plan to rescue her.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy Scissorhands
programme.desc: Billy and Taylor need help clearing the tracks; they're full of overgrown weeds. Teddy transforms Troy into a giant pruning train.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Lifeguard
programme.desc: Henry has fallen into the lake and needs urgent help! Troy transforms into a lifeguard to rescue his friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Film Director
programme.desc: Tony needs someone to film his daring stunt and enlists Troy's help. Teddy transforms him into a camera rig!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nadar
programme.desc: Glub, glub, glub! Aprenda os estilos de natação e os cuidados com a água na hora de nadar!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Tambem sou um animal
programme.desc: Somos todos animais, e se temos os nossos bichinhos, não podemos deixar de cuidar deles com carinho!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Quem eu sou
programme.desc: Uma brincadeira musical sobre nossas confusas relações de parentesco!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Barulhinho bom
programme.desc: Um rock que nos ensina que a música pode ser feita por qualquer um a qualquer hora!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Brincar
programme.desc: Nada de ficar parado! Mais que brinquedos, para brincar é preciso muita imaginação e energia!Nada de ficar parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nana, Girafinha
programme.desc: Depois do agito, deixe a criançada relaxar ao som de uma gostosa bossa-nova!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarelvis 02
programme.desc: O mundo fica ainda mais divertido com a ajuda dos amigos do Jacarelvis!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Banho eu vou tomar
programme.desc: Agora ficou fácil dar o banho das crianças com essa animada canção!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - O Lixo e o meu tesouro
programme.desc: Uma aventura pirata que ensina sobre geração de lixo e reciclagem! Arrá! Iourrou!

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Altamira
programme.desc: Chip and the atoms enter into a cave that is full of paintings on the walls. A gate blocks the way to the cave in a place where cells of chemical elements and an oven are piled up. Following the directions of the paintings and with the help of Chip’s chemistry book he discovers he has to mix and merge several elements for make a shoes of glass with which he is able to walk on a floor full of acid, so that the door is lifted and he can follow the road. When the antimatters try to follow him, when mixing chemicals products, these smash their noses.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - The load
programme.desc: A transport loaded with nitrates is directed towards the Black Tower for Dr. No to prepare explosives. Chip, slips in the transport with the intention of being carried to his destination, but when he realizes about the load, makes every effort to ensure that this does not fall into the hands of the evil scientist. So with the help of bromine atoms prisoners, manages to destroy the transport and its dangerous load.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Snow Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron joins a friendly snow fight between the cars, but soon uses his Zitronic to trap them in ice cubes!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Basketball Game
programme.desc: Zitron derails a fun basketball game between the cars. Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - UFO Invasion
programme.desc: A UFO steals everything on its path in Car City! Robo teams up with Rocky to stop the UFO and Zitron.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Strongest Truck
programme.desc: Zitron challenges the cars to a strength contest, but turns Marley into the Hulk, and he's completely out of control!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Fresh & Clean
programme.desc: Baby Frank's been playing at the paint shooting range as in covered in it! Tom gets him all shiny again.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: Baby Hector's spent the afternoon jumping in puddles; the mud got his blades stuck! Time for a trip to the carwash.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Beehive
programme.desc: Jeremy's crashed into a beehive and is covered in honey! Tom helps him get rid of the sticky stuff.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Rusty Chuck
programme.desc: Chuck’s Cherry picker arm is rusty and stiff. He goes to Tom’s Car Wash to get cleaned up and oiled up!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Playdate
programme.desc: Baby Amber got all dirty while playing with Baby Matt. Tom giver her an emergency carwash and a polish.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - Cheer Mia Up
programme.desc: Miranda makes a cure to cheer up Mia, but she runs out of Happy Bird Eggs!

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - A Contest
programme.desc: Max and Mike argue about who is the strongest monster

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - The Magnetic Rock
programme.desc: Miranda takes a drive through the forest and hears a humming noise coming from a rock on the side of the mountain, which suddenly pulls her towards it

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - Chasing Mia
programme.desc: Mia is blown away in a strong wind while trying to retrieve Miranda's kite, and the Monster Trucks are in pursuit!

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Lost In Marseille
programme.desc: Bruno, a stay-at-home father of two, gets back in touch with his masculinity when his wife is kidnapped in Marseille. Instead of the planned holiday on the Côte d'Azur, Bruno gets deeper and deeper into an intrigue, pursued by police and mafia.

programme.title: Heart Of A Lion
programme.desc: Teppo, the leader of a gang of neo-nazis, falls in love with Sari. To his shock, Sari’s son is black, and Teppo finds his prejudices and loyalties pitted against his desire for love and family.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Jealousy
programme.desc: Inspector Bruhl is investigating the abduction of a young boy from a playground, until evidence suggests that the boy doesn’t exist at all. Is he a figment of the alleged mother’s fractured reality, or are answers buried in her traumatic past?

programme.title: Red, White And Brass
programme.desc: In a bid to sneak into the Tonga vs France rugby match, superfan Maka invents a fake band to perform for the pre-game show. With the match coming soon, Maka and his friends have four weeks to come up with a performance

programme.title: Catch The Wind
programme.desc: Edith is a middle-aged woman, estranged from her son and now about to lose her job as a textile factory worker. With nothing to hold her to her hometown, she decides to move to Morocco where her factory has relocated instead of facing unemployment.

programme.title: The Kiss
programme.desc: In 1913 Denmark, young officer Anton grapples with duty and love when he befriends Baron von Løvenskjold's daughter, Edith, confined to a wheelchair. As their bond deepens, Anton is ensnared in a web of promises and lies, torn between pity and true love.

programme.title: Your Children
programme.desc: Anja and Frank are holidaying by the Baltic Sea with their two children. Anja leaves them alone for a while, but upon return, they are nowhere in sight. While searching for them, Anja discovers that Frank has never told her the truth about his father.

programme.title: Above the Clouds
programme.desc: After losing his parents in a flood, 15-year-old Andy is forced to live in the Mountain Province with his estranged grandfather. Feeling they’ve lost everything, the two embark on a journey and start to come to terms with their grief.

programme.title: My Killer Buddy
programme.desc: Denni is 10 years old and has a mission, to save his mother from his father’s violence. For this reason he devises an infallible plan: he will have him killed by someone who kills people for a living, a super-killer.

programme.title: A Son
programme.desc: A family’s holiday in Tunisia ends in disaster, when their 10-year-old son Aziz is shot during a terrorist ambush. At the hospital where Aziz is in desperate need of a transplant, the family discovers a long-buried secret.

programme.title: Mr. K
programme.desc: Mr. K, a traveling magician, finds himself in a Kafkaesque nightmare when he can’t find the exit of the hotel, he has slept in. His attempts to get out only pull him deeper, entangling him further with the hotel and its curious inhabitants.

programme.title: The Cave Of The Yellow Dog
programme.desc: Nansal, a Mongolian nomadic girl finds a puppy and brings it home but her father believes it to be bad luck. But when the dog saves the family’s baby, he finally accepts it. Central to this tale is the belief in the cycle of rebirth between man and dog.

programme.title: Last Rain On My Parade
programme.desc: A hairdresser and a ride-hailing driver share intimate encounters on rainy days. But the rain subsides, they meet one last time on the crowded streets amidst Vietnam’s football victory celebrations—caught between fleeting connection and a nation’s triumph.

programme.title: The President
programme.desc: After a brutal coup topples his regime, a fallen dictator flees with his young grandson. Disguised as street musicians, they cross a country scarred by his rule, exposed firsthand to the suffering he had ignored.

programme.title: Intimate Stranger
programme.desc: In post-COVID Tokyo, single mother Megumi is desperate to find her missing son Shinpei. After a shady young man claims to know her son’s whereabouts, he is invited into Megumi’s home where he soon uncovers a shocking secret.
